intent: Define the absolute best-state insight surface AskElephant could provide across all connected systems, optimized for trust, outcomes, and defensible customer value.

positioning_guardrails.north_star: AskElephant is a revenue outcome system, not a transcript dashboard.
anti_vision_checks: No generic summary metrics that cannot tie to behavior change.
No claims without provenance, confidence, and freshness.

dream_insights.label: Signal-to-Action Rate
dream_insights.description: Percent of customer or deal-risk signals in Slack that become tracked actions in workflows, CRM, or tasks within target SLA.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Faster risk response and lower revenue leakage.
dream_insights.example_question: How often are risk signals acknowledged and acted on within 24h?

dream_insights.label: Revenue Moment Heatmap
dream_insights.description: Classifies Slack conversations into wins, risks, expansion opportunities, blockers, and maps response velocity by team.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Improved execution quality and forecast confidence.
dream_insights.example_question: Which teams are fastest at closing the loop on expansion signals?

dream_insights.label: Coaching Gap Index
dream_insights.description: Identifies reps whose conversation risk patterns are high but coaching interactions are low.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Higher quota attainment via targeted coaching.
dream_insights.example_question: Who shows repeated objection patterns but has low manager coaching coverage?

dream_insights.label: Autonomous Pipeline Progress
dream_insights.description: Measures pipeline movement attributable to AskElephant-triggered actions vs. human-only updates.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Proves platform contribution to time-to-close.
dream_insights.example_question: How much pipeline progression this quarter was assisted by AskElephant actions?

dream_insights.label: Data Hygiene Recovery
dream_insights.description: Tracks missing/incorrect CRM fields detected from meetings and automatically corrected with confidence scoring.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Improves forecast reliability and reporting trust.
dream_insights.example_question: How many stale deal properties were auto-corrected from meeting evidence?

dream_insights.label: Risk-to-Save Conversion
dream_insights.description: Quantifies at-risk deals/accounts rescued after AskElephant surfaced risk signals and triggered interventions.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Increases retention and reduces churn.
dream_insights.example_question: What percentage of high-risk accounts recovered after intervention playbooks ran?

dream_insights.label: Decision Velocity
dream_insights.description: Time from signal intake to documented decision with owner, rationale, and next action.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Faster execution and less organizational drift.
dream_insights.example_question: How long does it take us to convert customer evidence into a documented decision?

dream_insights.label: Artifact Completeness Score
dream_insights.description: Evaluates initiative quality gates across research, PRD, design brief, engineering spec, launch and metrics.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Higher quality launches and fewer downstream misses.
dream_insights.example_question: Which active initiatives have the highest execution risk due to artifact gaps?

dream_insights.label: Evidence Traceability
dream_insights.description: Percent of roadmap and PRD claims directly traceable to customer signals, calls, or revenue data.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Increases strategic rigor and trust in roadmap choices.
dream_insights.example_question: How much of our roadmap is evidence-backed versus intuition-backed?

dream_insights.label: Revenue Response SLA
dream_insights.description: Monitors response times for customer and prospect emails by segment and urgency.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Improves conversion and account confidence.
dream_insights.example_question: Which account tiers are receiving slower-than-target responses?

dream_insights.label: Expansion Signal Mining
dream_insights.description: Detects growth intent, product demand, and champion momentum from inbound email language.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Increases expansion pipeline creation rate.
dream_insights.example_question: How many expansion opportunities were first detected in email before CRM updates?

dream_insights.label: Meeting ROI Index
dream_insights.description: Compares meeting time investment with measurable downstream outcomes (deal progression, action completion, risk reduction).
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Reduces non-productive meeting load and improves close velocity.
dream_insights.example_question: Which recurring meetings consume time without moving revenue outcomes?

dream_insights.label: Champion Engagement Model
dream_insights.description: Maps stakeholder attendance and engagement consistency to win/churn likelihood.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Improves risk detection and champion strategy.
dream_insights.example_question: Which accounts show declining champion engagement before churn signals appear?

dream_insights.label: Commitment Reliability Score
dream_insights.description: Tracks follow-through quality on customer commitments captured in calls, Slack, and email.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Builds trust and reduces preventable churn.
dream_insights.example_question: Where are we making commitments we do not close on time?

dream_insights.label: Design-to-Delivery Latency
dream_insights.description: Measures time from approved design intent to shipped experience and links delays to bottlenecks.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Improves speed and quality of execution.
dream_insights.example_question: How long does it take us to turn approved design into customer-visible value?

dream_insights.label: Intent Drift Detector
dream_insights.description: Compares shipped behavior against intended design rationale, accessibility, and trust cues.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Protects user trust and UX quality.
dream_insights.example_question: Which shipped screens diverged most from approved trust-critical design cues?

dream_insights.label: Signal-to-Ship Cycle Time
dream_insights.description: Measures elapsed time from customer signal detection to shipped fix/feature and customer communication.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Faster learning loops and stronger retention.
dream_insights.example_question: How quickly do we ship meaningful responses to high-impact customer feedback?

dream_insights.label: Risk-Weighted Delivery Index
dream_insights.description: Prioritizes throughput not just by ticket count, but by customer/revenue risk mitigated.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Aligns engineering execution with business impact.
dream_insights.example_question: How much customer risk did this sprint actually remove?

dream_insights.label: Outcome Funnel Attribution
dream_insights.description: Attribution model linking usage behaviors and agent actions to retention, expansion, and conversion outcomes.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Clarifies what product behaviors actually move revenue outcomes.
dream_insights.example_question: Which usage sequences most strongly predict expansion and low churn risk?

dream_insights.label: Feature Trust Index
dream_insights.description: Composite score blending adoption depth, user correction patterns, override rates, and sentiment to evaluate trust.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Ensures automation scales with confidence, not friction.
dream_insights.example_question: Which automations are adopted but still distrusted due to frequent overrides?

dream_insights.label: Revenue Momentum Nowcast
dream_insights.description: Predictive short-horizon model for win likelihood based on live behavior, activity quality, and risk signals.
dream_insights.business_outcome_link: Improves planning and intervention timing.
dream_insights.example_question: What is most likely to close this month and what actions could change that?

cross_integration_super_insights.label: Customer 360 Outcome Graph
cross_integration_super_insights.description: Unified timeline linking meetings, Slack/email signals, CRM updates, tasks, product usage, and outcomes per account.
cross_integration_super_insights.value: Single source of truth for account health and momentum.
cross_integration_super_insights.example_question: What chain of events led this enterprise account from neutral to expansion-ready?

cross_integration_super_insights.label: Deal Autopilot Effectiveness
cross_integration_super_insights.description: Measures incremental lift from AskElephant-assisted workflows compared to matched unassisted cohorts.
cross_integration_super_insights.value: Defensible ROI for renewals and expansion conversations.
cross_integration_super_insights.example_question: How much faster do assisted deals move versus non-assisted deals?

cross_integration_super_insights.label: Trust and Transparency Score
cross_integration_super_insights.description: Blends privacy compliance, correction rate, explanation usage, override frequency, and user sentiment.
cross_integration_super_insights.value: Ensures growth does not come at the expense of trust.
cross_integration_super_insights.example_question: Are we scaling automation while increasing or decreasing user trust?

cross_integration_super_insights.label: Manager Leverage Index
cross_integration_super_insights.description: Quantifies how effectively manager time is converted into rep improvement through targeted AI-assisted coaching.
cross_integration_super_insights.value: Higher team performance without linear manager effort growth.
cross_integration_super_insights.example_question: Where is manager coaching generating the greatest measurable rep performance change?

cross_integration_super_insights.label: Signal-to-Revenue Closed Loop
cross_integration_super_insights.description: Tracks every major signal from detection to action to business outcome with accountability and timing.
cross_integration_super_insights.value: Turns product telemetry into business narrative clarity.
cross_integration_super_insights.example_question: How much revenue impact came from acted-on signals this quarter?

must_have: freshness timestamp and expected refresh SLA
privacy and permission guardrails by role

strategic_use_cases.goal: Tell a defensible value narrative in under 5 minutes.
Show attributable business impact prior to renewal conversation.
Run weekly operating review with outcome-linked leading indicators.

phase_3_attribution: automated QBR and renewal value packs
